news.t: Looking to reduce your carbon footprint and make money? This ETF focuses on going green in more ways than one

holdings.infoBox: EMCR is an equity ETF with a total of 1394 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 11.80%, Samsung Electronics at 6.34%, SK hynix at 5.07%, Tencent Holdings at 3.53%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 2.46%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers Emerging Markets Carbon Reduction and Climate Improvers ETF (EMCR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap emerging market stocks that are selected based on ESG criteria. Holdings are weighted in tiers, in favor of low carbon intensity EMCR was launched on Dec 6, 2018 and is issued by Xtrackers.

data.title: Looking to reduce your carbon footprint and make money? This ETF focuses on going green in more ways than one
data.text: Run by DWS Group, the Emerging Markets Carbon Reduction and Climate Improvers ETF (EMCR) invests in public companies that are reducing their carbon footprints.

data.title: ETF Edge: Emerging (& Reducing) Markets?
data.text: One ETF is trying to hit two birds with one stone... but with mixed results right now.
